chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-194 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection. 2.For hearing of main case. 05-03-2024 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jamba, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondents submits that already preliminary inspection reports of the area for supply of gas are available with the respondents. The issue is stuck for want of funds only and as soon as funds are released by the relevant Government of Pakistan, the lines for supplying gas to the petitioner would be laid down. He further submits that since new Government has been set up in the Federation, he is hopeful that funds would be released within 2/3 months. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. If the funds are released or in case funds are not released within a period of three months, report shall be filed in this petition for a perusal. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
